_comment: Starter MCP config for pi-mom (loaded by pi-mcp-adapter, wired in apps/pi-mom/lib/pi-sdk-runner.mjs). Copy/edit, then either (a) drop the result at ${PI_AGENT_DIR}/mcp.json, (b) base64-encode it into PI_MCP_JSON_B64 for the runner to seed onto the Railway volume on cold boot, or (c) commit a sanitized version at .mcp.json for project-scoped servers. Env-var interpolation uses ${VAR} / $env:VAR — never paste real tokens into git. Lifecycle defaults to lazy (server starts on first tool call). Set directTools per-server to surface specific tools alongside Pi's read/bash/edit/write; otherwise tools stay behind the single `mcp` proxy.

github._comment: Write-capable GitHub MCP server (ADR 0010). PR create/merge are gated by explicit Slack user approval — see ADR 0010 for the approval boundary and apps/pi-mom/README.md for the persistent-volume reseed procedure. X-MCP-Readonly / X-MCP-Lockdown are intentionally omitted so write tools surface; X-MCP-Toolsets still scopes the exposed surface. The bearer token is referenced by env-var name only; the value lives in Railway secrets, never in git or logs.
